title: Check Tool Json Schema
description: Base schema for Comcheck Tool Building

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

control.description: project control that contains the project meta data

semiheated.description: A boolean to indicate whether the project is a semi-heated type

isNonresidentialConditioning.description: Flag to indicate the building has conditional type of non-resindetial conditioning.
isNonresidentialConditioning.$comment: true: non-residential conditioning, false: not non-residential conditioning

isResidentialConditioning.description: Flag to indicate the building has conditional type of resindetial conditioning.
isResidentialConditioning.$comment: true: residential conditioning, false: not residential conditioning

isSemiheatedConditioning.description: Flag to indicate the building has conditional type of semiheated conditioning.
isSemiheatedConditioning.$comment: true: semiheated conditioning, false: not semiheated conditioning.

energyCreditPerformanceRating.description: Appendix C compliance index for energy credit calculation
energyCreditPerformanceRating.$comment: Applicable to 90.1 2022 for envelope performance energy credit calculation.

buildingUseType.$comment: Legacy enum, only ACTIVITY is valid in the new ComCheck Web

allElectric.description: Advanced reporting indicates whether the project is all electric
allElectric.$comment: true: all electric, false: otherwise, use integer 0 is false, 1 or above is true

isRenewable.description: Advanced reporting indicates whether the project has on-site renewable system
isRenewable.$comment: true: has on-site renewable system, false: otherwise, use integer 0 is false, 1 or above is true

hasBattery.description: Advanced reporting indicates whether the project has installed on-site battery
hasBattery.$comment: true: has onsite battery, false: otherwise, use integer 0 is false, 1 or above is true

hasCharger.description: Advanced reporting indicates whether the project has on-site generator
hasCharger.$comment: true: has onsite generator, false: otherwise, use integer 0 is false, 1 or above is true

hasHeatPump.description: Advanced reporting indicates whether the building conditioned by heat pumps
hasHeatPump.$comment: true: has heat pump, false: otherwise, use integer 0 is false, 1 or above is true

projectSubType.$comment: The availability of sub-type is based on the project type selected.

projectMechanicalType.$comment: The availability of sub-type is based on the project sub-type selected.

projectCoreAndShellCredit.description: Project credits gained from core and shell

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

version.description: Software version - shall always set to an empty string

complianceMode.$comment: For COMcheck API call, this value should always be UA.

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

door.$comment: Door list under $.envelope shall only be used in Alteration projects

window.$comment: Window list under $.envelope shall only be used in Alteration projects

skylight.description: Skylights, must be assigned to a roof
skylight.$comment: Skylight list under $.envelope shall only be used in Alteration projects

useOrientationDetails.$comment: This field shall always set to true

useVltDetails.description: use visible transmittance details in fenestration for calculation
useVltDetails.$comment: This field shall always set to true

useCoolRoofPerformanceDetails.description: use cool roof / high albedo roof details for calculation
useCoolRoofPerformanceDetails.$comment: This field shall always set to true

postAltWindowWallPct.description: post alteration window to wall ratio in percentage

postAltSkylightRoofPct.description: post alteration skylight to roof ratio in percentage

applyWindowPctAllowanceForDaylighting.description: Apply window percentage allowance for daylighting, default false

applySkylightPctAllowanceForDaylighting.description: Apply skylight percentage allowance for daylighting, default false

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

state.description: United States states, spell the full name, e.g., Washington

county.description: county name, spell the full name

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

description.$comment: This needs to be unique across all ag walls.

bldgUseKey.description: key reference of the building use area data group

agWallConstructionDetailsType.description: Above grade wall construction details type

agWallExteriorFinishDetailsType.description: Above grade wall exterior finish details

nextToUncondSpace.description: Flag indicates whether the space is next to an unconditioned space

insulationPosition.description: Not sure why basement has this data, likely deprecated. Use null

otherWallType.$comment: This data should be NONE unless the $.wallType == OTHER_AG_WALL

adjacentSpaceType.description: Space type of the adjacent space
adjacentSpaceType.$comment: This data is used to identify the required maximum U factor in 90.1 energy codes. Be sure to set a not null value in 90.1 energy code

adjacentSpaceBuildingType.description: Building type of the adjacent space
adjacentSpaceBuildingType.$comment: This data is used for reference - no actual impact on calculations.

effectiveUFactor.description: The effective U factor after thermal bridge adjustment
effectiveUFactor.$comment: This value is calculated from engine - modify this number does not impact compliance calculation

thermalBridgeAdjustmentFactor.$comment: This value is calculated from engine - modify this number does not impact compliance calculation

allowanceType.$comment: TODO - need to fill in the background?

constructionType.$comment: TODO - verify if this is still needed?

exemptionType.$comment: TODO - verify if this is still needed. Used in IECC 2012 only

furringType.descriptions: Type of furring installation, used for mass surfaces

heatCapacity.description: heat capacity of a mass wall. Used in other mass wall type
heatCapacity.$comment: Only used when $.wallType == OTHER_AG_WALL and $.otherWallType == AG_WALL_OTHER_MASS

cavityRValue.description: Average insulation R-value in the cavity between two studs.

continuousRValue.description: Continuous insulation on the above grade wall. Can be exterior or interior or both.

continuousDeratedRValue.description: Continuous R value derated factor for thermal bridge effect
continuousDeratedRValue.$comment: This factor is calculaed in the engine based on user inputs and is used for calculating the continuesR value in MAS code.

propUValue.description: Proposed thermal transmittance of the above grade wall.

depthOfInsulation.description: depth of insulation, it only works on a certain numbers including 1, 2, 3, 4, 93, 94, 95 ,96, 97, 98, 99. Mapping is in the $comment
depthOfInsulation.$comment: 1 -> 1ft, 2 -> 2ft, 3 -> 3ft, 4 -> 4ft, 93 -> Fully insulated, 94 -> Fully Insulated (user specified perimeter R-value + R-3.5 under slab), 95 -> Fully Insulated (user specified perimeter R-value + R-5.0 under slab), 96 -> Fully Insulated (user specified perimeter R-value + R-7.5 under slab), 97 -> Fully Insulated (user specified perimeter R-value + R-10.0 under slab, 98 ->Fully Insulated (user specified perimeter R-value + R-15.0 under slab), 99 -> Fully Insulated (user specified perimeter R-value + R-20.0 under slab)

slabFullInsulBelowMinRValue.description: Full insulation R value below the slab -> the number if fixed based on the selection of depthOfInsulation

hasEdgeInsul.description: A boolean to indicate whether the bldg use area uses edge insulation

id.description: Scope-unique reference identifier for instances of this data group.
id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

constVolMixingBox.description: Flag to identify whether the HVAC system has constant volume mixing box (deprecated, set to false).

coolingEquipCapacity.description: Cooling equipment capacity, kBtu/hr as default, but can be tons based on system type.

description.description: unique name of the HVAC system

fanPoweredVav.description: Flag to identify whether the VAV system is fan powered

spaceHeatingSystemException.description: Exceptions for electric space heating system - Denver 2022 requirement. Can be null for other codes
spaceHeatingSystemException.$comment: Only effective and required if the energy code ==  CEZ_CO_DENVER_IECC2021

hydronicReheat.description: Flag to identify whether the HVAC has a hydronic reheat system, (deprecated, set to false)

isHeatingSysWeatherized.description: Flag to identify whether the heating system is weatherized, (deprecated, set to false)

perimeterSystem.description: Flag to identify whether the HVAC system is used to condition perimeter zones

propCoolingEquipEfficiencyPartial.description: Proposed system cooling equipment part load efficiency

reheatRecoolCoil.description: Flag to identify whether the coils are reheat and recooled (deprecated, set to false)

steamReheat.description: Flag to identify whether the HVAC system is steam reheated (deprecated, set to false)

id.$comment: All id data elements are shown as required so that every data group can be explcitly identified.

condenserFlowRate.description: Condenser flow rate - this data comes from engine. User change this data does not have impact on compliance check

condenserLeavingTemperature.description: leaving water temperature - this data comes from engine. User change this data does not have impact on compliance check

enteringCondenserWaterTemperature.description: Condenser entering water temperature - this data comes from engine. User change this data does not have impact on compliance check

evaporatorLeavingTemperature.description: Evaporator leaving water temperature - this data comes from engine. User change this data does not have impact on compliance check

heatPumpChillerHeatingSourceConditions.description: Heat Pump Chiller Heating Source Condition

heatPumpChillerLeavingHeatingWaterTemp.description: Heat pump chiller leaving heating water temperature

heatRecovery.description: Flag indicates whether the system has heat recovery feature

heatPumpSimultaneousCoolingAndHeating.description: Flag indicates whether the heat pump can do simultaneous cooling and heating

leavingChilledWaterTemperature.description: Leaving chiller water temperature - this data comes from engine. User change this data does not have impact on compliance check

propCoolingPlantEfficiencyPartial.description: Proposed cooling plant part load efficiency

twoPipeSystem.description: Flag identifies if the plant system is a two pipe system

waterloopHeatPump.description: Flag identifies if the plant system is a water loop heat pump

efficiencyRequirementException.description: Natural gas boiler efficiency requirement exceptions

hasPressureDropCredits.description: Flag indicates if the fan system has pressure drop credits
